HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering

19#define SOMMERFELD_INTEGRATOR_H

23#include "SurfaceMesh.h"
24#include "LayeredMediaUtils.h"
25#include <stdexcept> // For exception handling
26#include <functional> // For std::function

36class SommerfeldIntegrator {
37 private:
38 // ---- Material stack / geometry ----
39 std::vector<dcmplx> k_L;
40 int materialIndex;
41 int sourceIndex;
42 std::vector<dcmplx> epsilon;
43 std::vector<dcmplx> mu;
44 std::vector<double> zValsInterfaces;
45 std::vector<double> thickness;
46
47 // ---- Contour / subtraction parameters ----
48 double semiReal;
49 double semiImag;
50 double ratio;
51 std::map<std::string, double> options;
52 double cutoff;
53
54 // ---- Utilities ----
55 LayeredMediaUtils* layeredUtils;
56
57 public:
75 SommerfeldIntegrator(const std::vector<dcmplx> k_L, int inMaterialIndex,
76 const std::vector<dcmplx>& inEpsilonMedium,
77 const std::vector<dcmplx>& inMuMedium,
78 const std::vector<double>& inZValsInterfaces,
79 const std::vector<double>& inThickness,
80 double inSemiReal = 4.0, double inSemiImag = 0.05,
81 double inRatio = 1.0, double inCutoff = 0.1);
82
101 SommerfeldIntegrator(const std::vector<dcmplx> k_L,
102 int inMaterialIndex, int inSourceIndex,
103 const std::vector<dcmplx>& inEpsilonMedium,
104 const std::vector<dcmplx>& inMuMedium,
105 const std::vector<double>& inZValsInterfaces,
106 const std::vector<double>& inThickness,
107 double inSemiReal = 4.0, double inSemiImag = 0.05,
108 double inRatio = 0.8, double inCutoff = 0.1);
109
111 ~SommerfeldIntegrator();
112
113 // -------------------- Path selection helpers --------------------
129 Data2D selectData2D(const std::vector<std::vector<double>>& r,
130 const std::vector<std::vector<double>>& z1,
131 const std::vector<std::vector<double>>& z2,
132 const std::string& path);
133
149 Data3D selectData3D(const std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<double>>>& r,
150 const std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<double>>>& z1,
151 const std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<double>>>& z2,
152 const std::string& path);
153
166 std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<double>>> interDist(
167 std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<double>>> z,
168 int index, double direction);
169
188 std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>>>
189 Secondary(dcmplx krho, std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<double>>> r,
190 std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<double>>> z1,
191 std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<double>>> z2, const std::string& waves);
192
193 // -------------------- Integrands --------------------
212 IntegrandIntra IntraIntegrand(const std::vector<dcmplx>& rq_te,
213 const std::vector<dcmplx>& rq_tm,
214 const Data2D& inData2D, dcmplx kr, dcmplx kz,
215 const std::string& mode, const std::string& op = "");
216
233 IntegrandInter InterIntegrand(const dcmplx& tq_te, const dcmplx& tq_tm,
234 const Data3D& inData3D, dcmplx kr,
235 const std::string& mode);
236
237 // -------------------- Integration and evaluation --------------------
257 IntegrandIntra integrationFIntra(const std::vector<dcmplx>& rq_te,
258 const std::vector<dcmplx>& rq_tm,
259 const Data2D& inData, double x, double k_max,
260 const IntegrandIntra& intZeroKrho,
261 const std::string& path, const std::string& op = "");
262
281 IntegrandInter integrationFInter(const dcmplx& tq_te, const dcmplx& tq_tm,
282 const Data3D& inData, double x, double k_max,
283 const IntegrandInter& intZeroKrho,
284 const std::string& path);
285
300 CoeffsIntra Evaluate(const std::vector<dcmplx>& rq_te, const std::vector<dcmplx>& rq_tm,
301 const std::vector<std::vector<double>>& r,
302 const std::vector<std::vector<double>>& z,
303 bool singular, const std::string& op = "");
304
320 CoeffsInter Evaluate(const dcmplx& tq_te, const dcmplx& tq_tm,
321 const std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<double>>>& r,
322 const std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<double>>>& z1,
323 const std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<double>>>& z2,
324 bool singular, const std::string& op = "");
325
326 // -------------------- Debugging / testing --------------------
332 void writeMatrixToFile(const std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>& matrix,
333 const std::string& filename);
334
340 void write3DMatrixToFile(const std::vector<std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>>>& matrix,
341 const std::string& filename);
342
343 // -------------------- Fresnel coefficients --------------------
363 std::vector<dcmplx> FresnelCoeff(int layerIndexI, int layerIndexJ,
364 dcmplx krho, const std::string& waves) const;
365};
366
